creator: laddassm@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org!

I corrected this port to coordinate it with "portlint -A":

______________________________________________
-- klat4.shar.txt      2008-09-14 00:48:12.000000000 +0400
+++ klat4.sh.txt        2008-09-14 14:36:07.000000000 +0400
@@ -32,7 +32,8 @@
 X
 XUSE_BZIP2=    yes
 XUSE_CMAKE=    yes
-XUSE_KDE4=     kdeprefix kdelibs
+XUSE_KDE4=     kdeprefix       kdelibs
+XINSTALLS_ICONS=       yes
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-/usr/ports/editors/klat4/Makefile
@@ -48,7 +49,7 @@
 X
 XWWW: http://www.algebraic.ru/klat4/
 X
-XAnna A. Ladilova, Dmitry V. Reshetnikov
+XAuthors: Anna A. Ladilova, Dmitry V. Reshetnikov
 Xladilova@algebraic.ru
 END-of-/usr/ports/editors/klat4/pkg-descr
 echo x - /usr/ports/editors/klat4/pkg-plist
__________________________________________________

On Sat, 13 Sep 2008 21:20:00 GMT
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/127361'.

Best regards, Anna A. Ladilova.
